experience_chunks.description: Mechanical engineering design role at a hardware-product company at Initech.
Owned the ranking layer for an e-commerce search product, evolving it from a hand-tuned scoring function to a learning-to-rank model over 9 months at BYJU'S.
Built a content recommendation system serving 10M+ users that combined collaborative filtering with content-based ranking at Dream11.
